SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:34 am
Judge Pro David Fleisig, clerk - K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Cheryl A. Edison not present and Francesco D'ippolito present with attorney George M. Rush (bar #212952)for both appellants. Respondent Katherine Robersts present in pro per and James Dyer as witness for respondent. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro David Fleisig.

EXRA: Pictures of damages.
EXRB: Copy of the 2nd amended claim.
EXRC: Contractor payment and invoce.
EXRD: Estimate of flooring (july 3,2007)
EXA1: Pictures from rental property (June.2007).
EXA2: Amendment to lease agreement.

11:22 am
Exhibits retained. Case submitted
